name: breadcrumbs-mcp
description: Connect Codex to Breadcrumbs via MCP and guide feature lifecycle updates through the project board, notes, docs, and coding log.

interface.shortDescription: Use Breadcrumbs project context, kanban, notes, docs, and logs from Codex
interface.longDescription: Breadcrumbs MCP connects Codex to a Breadcrumbs project so agents can read project context, inspect and update the kanban board, add card notes, write documentation pages, and post coding log entries during feature work.
defaultPrompt: Start work on the selected Breadcrumbs card
Finish the feature and update Breadcrumbs
